summary: Full smoke test of C&C barber shop app. Backend: all 7 API checks pass (login good/bad, create appointment unauth, list/patch/delete admin, /auth/me). Frontend: home page loads with all 4 service cards and both QR codes; navigation to /book works; booking form submission shows success; admin login -> dashboard -> filter buttons, status update (Confirm), delete, and logout all functional; invalid login shows toast 'Invalid email or password'.
passed: GET / loads home-page with hero, 4 service-card-{haircut,manicure,pedicure,spa} and both QR codes (booking-qr-code, booking-qr-code-secondary) visible
Booking form fills (name/email/phone/service/stylist/date/time/notes) and shows booking-success
POST /api/appointments returns 200 with appointment record (no auth required)
POST /api/auth/login with admin@candc.com/admin123 returns 200 with JWT (field name: 'token')
POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401 'Invalid email or password'
GET /api/appointments with Bearer token returns list (200)
PATCH /api/appointments/{id} with token updates status to confirmed (200)
/admin/login -> Sign In -> redirects to /admin and admin-dashboard renders
Filter buttons filter-{all,pending,confirmed,completed,cancelled} all present and 'confirmed' filter narrows to confirmed rows
Actions dropdown -> Confirm updates row status badge to CONFIRMED
Actions dropdown -> Delete removes the row
logout-btn clears cc_admin_token from localStorage and redirects to /admin/login
Invalid login shows toast error 'Invalid email or password'
notes: Login endpoint returns token in field 'token' (not 'access_token'); frontend api.js / AdminLogin.jsx already consume data.token correctly so end-to-end auth works.
